title: Compound Words
description: You are to find all the two-word compound words in a dictionary. A two-word compound word is a word in the dictionary that is the concatenation of exactly two other words in the dictionary.
input: Standard input consists of a number of lowercase words, one per line, in alphabetical order. There will be no more than 120,000 words.
output: Your output should contain all the compound words, one per line, in alphabetical order.

samples.input:
a
alien
born
less
lien
never
nevertheless
new
newborn
the
zebra

source: Contest, Waterloo's local Programming Contests, 19 June, 2011
